name: python3-llvmlite
title: python3-llvmlite
summary: LLVM Python 3 binding for writing JIT compilers
description:
LLVM Python 3 binding for writing JIT compilers
llvmlite uses the LLVM library for JIT (just-in-time) compilation of
Python code into native machine instructions during runtime. Instead
of exposing large parts of the LLVM C++ API for direct calls into the
LLVM library, llvmlite follows a lightweight multi-layered approach.
.
This package contains the modules and the binding for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-llvmlite because LLVM Python 3 binding for writing JIT compilers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-llvmlite as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-llvmlite with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-llvmlite --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
